lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function perfectly. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical or cosmetic defects and appears as new. All service records are complete and up to date.

Get ready to be impressed! This car is in truly spectacular, mint condition, looking every bit as stunning as the day it was first sold. It has been kept in a climate-controlled garage and maintained to the highest standard, offering a flawless exterior and an interior that still feels brand new. You won't find a better-preserved example on the market!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though you might find a few minor stone chips on the hood from normal highway driving. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of any major tears or stains, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and all electronic features are fully functional. It provides a comfortable and reliable driving experience, making

This vehicle is in fair overall condition, offering a solid foundation for a daily driver but showing clear signs of its age and use. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with visible stone chips on the hood, a few shopping cart dings on the doors, and a scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the cloth seats show significant wear, particularly on the driver's side, and there are some permanent stains on the rear floor mats. While the engine and transmission are functional and the car remains roadworthy, the suspension has become somewhat noisy over bumps, and the tires will likely need replacement within the next 5,000 miles. It is a dependable vehicle that has been driven regularly, but it will require some cosmetic and minor mechanical attention to bring it back to its best.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a suite of premium features, it represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking both quality and value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and ready to hit the road with someone new! It’s been well-cared for and is looking for a good home. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Available is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline. This example is equipped with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and the factory M-Variable differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Significant preventative maintenance has been performed, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean interior. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained balance of performance and reliability. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only the minor road wear expected of a car that has been enjoyed and respected. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, with well-preserved seating surfaces and a fully functional suite of modern tech features. Mechanically, the car is in strong shape; it has received consistent scheduled maintenance, including recent fluid flushes and a multi-point inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission is responsive, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. It is a solid, turn-key example perfect for a discerning driver looking for quality without the new-car premium.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent performance. Both the interior and exterior reflect a standard of care that distinguishes it within its class. Offering a balance of reliability and sophisticated engineering, this vehicle is prepared for immediate service. We invite serious inquiries to experience the refined quality of this automotive investment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience with its structural and aesthetic integrity fully intact. A sophisticated selection for those who prioritize performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my reliable ride! It’s been such a fantastic car for me and is still in wonderful shape, running smoothly and looking great inside and out. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. I’ve taken really solid care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

This E92 BMW M3 showcases the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with its S65 4.0L V8, featuring individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential, ensuring exceptional mechanical grip and corner-exit traction. The chassis remains taut with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and refreshed suspension bushings. Critical preventative maintenance is documented, including rod bearing replacement and new throttle actuators, addressing common S65 weak points. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the mechanical synchronization and induction note remain flawless.
Well-maintained used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title and interior. Service records available.

This meticulously maintained sedan represents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior finish retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains a smoke-free sanctuary with supple leather seating, crisp digital displays, and a premium sound system that all function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent multi-point inspection. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the transmission shifts seamlessly. This is a solid, honest vehicle that has been garage-kept and treated with the utmost care, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable performance.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious blend of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure sustained performance and reliability. Experience the confidence of a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

Experience a superior standard of pre-owned excellence with this meticulously maintained vehicle. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with the expectations of a discerning owner. This unit represents a premier opportunity to acquire a dependable, high-caliber vehicle ready for immediate service.

Hey everyone! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car to own! It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It drives like a dream and is totally ready for your next road trip. I’m looking for someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS for a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M Variable Differential Lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. Performance is optimized with a reinforced rear subframe, refreshed VANOS hubs, and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The chassis dynamics are preserved through upgraded polyurethane bushings and a precise steering rack, maintaining its legendary 50/50 weight distribution. A mechanically robust driver’s car ready for the canyon or the track.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and style. The exterior maintains a deep shine, with only minor stone chips and light surface marks consistent with careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery remains taut and free of tears, while all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in strong health, featuring a responsive engine and a smooth-shifting transmission that provides a confident ride. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring it is road-trip ready. While not a showroom trailer-queen, it is a high-quality, dependable driver that has been treated with respect by its previous owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, a standout example of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience and a well-appointed interior, this selection represents an outstanding value proposition for the discerning motorist. We invite you to experience the superior caliber of our curated inventory firsthand.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, characterized by its robust mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic. This specimen exhibits consistent care and professional upkeep, offering the discerning driver a sophisticated experience and reliable performance. An exemplary acquisition for those who prioritize a harmonious balance of value and prestige.

Whether you’re commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go. You’re going to love how it feels on the road! Come check it out and see for yourself!

Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring smoke-free upholstery and fully functional electronics that provide a premium driving experience.
